English is a super cool language that lots of people love! Why do people [{}] to learn? Because it can open up a whole new world! There are many ways to [{}] English.

I love reading English comic books because it's like having a fun adventure. I also [{}] English programs because it helps me get used to the language. And the best part? Being able to [{}] with foreign friends in English!
